nasb.text: Simon, whom He also named Peter, and Andrew his brother; and James and John; and Philip and Bartholomew;

esv.text: Simon, whom he named Peter, and Andrew his brother, and James and John, and Philip, and Bartholomew,

cnv.text: 就是西門，和他弟弟安得烈，以及雅各、約翰、腓力、巴多羅邁、

ccb.text: 他们是：西门——耶稣给他取名叫彼得、西门的兄弟安得烈、雅各、约翰、腓力、巴多罗买、

csbs.text: 西门——耶稣又称他为彼得， 他的弟弟安得烈， 又有雅各、约翰、 腓力、巴多罗迈、
